name: React + Redux (Saga/Thunk)
description: Preset for React apps using Redux for state management. Covers Redux Toolkit, Redux Saga, and legacy Redux patterns.

common_invariants: After dispatch(reset): all slice fields return to initialState
Loading flag is true during API call, false after
Error state is set on saga failure
saga_patterns: try/catch/finally with options.handleLoading, onSuccess, onFailure, onFinish

extra_rules.name: State snapshot required for write tests
extra_rules.description: Tests that trigger Redux actions must capture state before and after
